nm:output.nm:control_stream: $PROBLEM RcppNM bench adv6_trans1 ADVAN=6 TRANS=1 $SUBROUTINE ADVAN6 TRANS1 TOL=9 $MODEL NCOMPS=2 $INPUT ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II $DATA design.csv IGNORE=@ $THETA (0.1, 1, 10) ; CL (1, 10, 100) ; V (0.1, 1, 10) ; KA $OMEGA 0.09 0.09 $SIGMA 0.1 0.5 $PK CL = THETA(1) * exp(ETA(1)) V = THETA(2) KA = THETA(3) * exp(ETA(2)) S1 = 1 S2 = V $DES DADT(1) = -KA*A(1) DADT(2) = KA*A(1) - (CL/V)*A(2) $ERROR Y = A(2)/S2 $SIM (2024 NEW) ONLYSIM $TABLE ID TIME DV PRED MDV EVID CMT SS II ONEHEADER NOPRINT NOAPPEND FILE=simtab_full
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.
(WARNING 85) EPS VARIABLES REQUIRED WITH ANALYSIS OF POPULATION DATA. PRESENT ABBREVIATED CODE COULD CAUSE AN ERROR IN A SUBSEQUENT RUN IF CHECKDATA OR ONLYSIM IS NOT USED.
(WARNING 32) $SIGMA INCLUDES A NON-FIXED INITIAL ESTIMATE CORRESPONDING TO AN EPS (OR ERR) THAT IS NOT USED IN ABBREVIATED CODE.
(WARNING 52) $ERROR: TO SIMULATE THE DV ITEM, DV SHOULD BE SET TO THE SIMULATED VALUE.

nm:nonmem.nm:license_information: License Registered to: Leiden Academic Center for Drug Research Expiration Date: 14 JAN 2028 Current Date: 25 JUN 2026 Days until program expires : 569
nm:nonmem.nm:program_information: 1NONLINEAR MIXED EFFECTS MODEL PROGRAM (NONMEM) VERSION 7.3.0 ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED BY STUART BEAL, LEWIS SHEINER, AND ALISON BOECKMANN CURRENT DEVELOPERS ARE ROBERT BAUER, ICON DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS, AND ALISON BOECKMANN. IMPLEMENTATION, EFFICIENCY, AND STANDARDIZATION PERFORMED BY NOUS INFOSYSTEMS.

nm:problem.nm:problem_information:
PROBLEM NO.: 1 RcppNM bench adv6_trans1 ADVAN=6 TRANS=1 0DATA CHECKOUT RUN: NO DATA SET LOCATED ON UNIT NO.: 2 THIS UNIT TO BE REWOUND: NO NO. OF DATA RECS IN DATA SET: 70 NO. OF DATA ITEMS IN DATA SET: 9 ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 1 DEP VARIABLE IS DATA ITEM NO.: 3 MDV DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 5 0INDICES PASSED TO SUBROUTINE PRED: 6 2 4 0 8 9 7 0 0 0 0 0LABELS FOR DATA ITEMS: ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II 0FORMAT FOR DATA: (9E5.0)
TOT. NO. OF OBS RECS: 62 TOT. NO. OF INDIVIDUALS: 6 0LENGTH OF THETA: 3 0DEFAULT THETA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0OMEGA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 2 0DEFAULT OMEGA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0SIGMA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 2 0DEFAULT SIGMA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF THETA: LOWER BOUND INITIAL EST UPPER BOUND 0.1000E+00 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+03 0.1000E+00 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF OMEGA: 0.9000E-01 0.0000E+00 0.9000E-01 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF SIGMA: 0.1000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.5000E+00 0SIMULATION STEP OMITTED: NO OBJ FUNC EVALUATED: NO 0SIMULATION RANDOM METHOD SELECTED (RANMETHOD): DEFAULT SOURCE 1: SEED1: 2024 SEED2: 0 PSEUDO-NORMAL DIFFERENT ETA AND EPS WITH EACH CALL TO SIMETA AND SIMEPS 0TABLES STEP OMITTED: NO NO. OF TABLES: 1 SEED NUMBER (SEED): 11456 RANMETHOD: MC SAMPLES (ESEED): 300 WRES SQUARE ROOT TYPE: EIGENVALUE 0-- TABLE 1 -- 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: NO PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: S1PE11.4 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID TIME DV PRED MDV EVID CMT SS II 1DOUBLE PRECISION PREDPP VERSION 7.3.0
GENERAL NONLINEAR KINETICS MODEL (ADVAN6) 0MODEL SUBROUTINE USER-SUPPLIED - ID NO. 9999 0MAXIMUM NO. OF BASIC PK PARAMETERS: 3 0COMPARTMENT ATTRIBUTES COMPT. NO. FUNCTION INITIAL ON/OFF DOSE DEFAULT DEFAULT STATUS ALLOWED ALLOWED FOR DOSE FOR OBS. 1 COMP 1 ON YES YES YES YES 2 COMP 2 ON YES YES NO NO 3 OUTPUT OFF YES NO NO NO 0GENERAL STEADY STATE (SS) ROUTINE IS BEING USED 0NRD VALUE FROM SUBROUTINE TOL: 9 1 ADDITIONAL PK PARAMETERS - ASSIGNMENT OF ROWS IN GG COMPT. NO. INDICES SCALE BIOAVAIL. ZERO-ORDER ZERO-ORDER ABSORB FRACTION RATE DURATION LAG 1 4 * * * * 2 5 * * * * 3 * - - - - - PARAMETER IS NOT ALLOWED FOR THIS MODEL * PARAMETER IS NOT SUPPLIED BY PK SUBROUTINE; WILL DEFAULT TO ONE IF APPLICABLE 0DATA ITEM INDICES USED BY PRED ARE: EVENT ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 6 TIME DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 2 DOSE AMOUNT DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 4 STEADY STATE DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 8 INTERVAL DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 9 COMPT. NO. DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 7
0PK SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. PK SUBROUTINE NOT CALLED AT NONEVENT (ADDITIONAL OR LAGGED) DOSE TIMES. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE INDICATES THAT DERIVATIVES OF COMPARTMENT AMOUNTS ARE USED. 0DES SUBROUTINE USES COMPACT STORAGE MODE.
nm:problem.nm:simulation_information: 1 SIMULATION STEP PERFORMED SOURCE 1: SEED1: 550968937 SEED2: 0
